items.description: Array of items to display in suggestions

onChange.description: Callback fired when values change: (event: ComponentEvent<T[]>) => void

onFilter.description: Callback fired when filter input changes: (query: string) => void | Promise<void>

placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the input field

debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds for filter callback

maxSelectedItems.description: Maximum number of items that can be selected

emptyMessage.description: Message shown when no items match the filter

renderItem.description: Custom render function for each item: (item: ListItem, index: number, isSelected: boolean, isHighlighted: boolean) => React.ReactNode

renderSelectedTemplate.description: Custom render function for selected items: (selectedItems: ListItem[], onRemove: (value: T) => void) => React.ReactNode

showCount.description: Show count of selected items when more than 3 are selected

autoFocus.description: Auto-focus the input field on mount

name.description: Name attribute for the hidden input field

args.description: Additional arguments passed to event callbacks
